root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no ) as member_name, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_date, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code, sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.different_shareloan, --88888888.88 as different_shareloan, --888888.88 as fund_mony, nvl((select sum(total_balance) as total_balance from sc_fund_mem where membership_no = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no),0) as fund_mony, sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_code, sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_old, --88888888.00 as shr_value sc_mem_m_resign_share.shr_value, '!resign_date_2!' as resign_date_full,
(select sum(t1.principal_balance) as sum_principal_balance from (SELECT sc_mem_m_resign_loan.loan_contract_no, sc_mem_m_resign_loan.principal_balance, sc_mem_m_resign_loan.interest, sc_mem_m_resign_loan.interest_arrear FROM sc_mem_m_resign_requestment, sc_mem_m_resign_loan, sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause WHERE ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no = sc_mem_m_resign_loan.resign_doc_no ) and sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_code = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code and sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.dead_status = '1' and sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_date between '!resign_date_1!' and '!resign_date_2!' ) t1) as sum_principal_balance,
(select sum(t1.interest) as sum_interest from (SELECT sc_mem_m_resign_loan.loan_contract_no, sc_mem_m_resign_loan.principal_balance, sc_mem_m_resign_loan.interest, sc_mem_m_resign_loan.interest_arrear FROM sc_mem_m_resign_requestment, sc_mem_m_resign_loan, sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause WHERE ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no = sc_mem_m_resign_loan.resign_doc_no ) and sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_code = sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code and sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.dead_status = '1' and sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_date between '!resign_date_1!' and '!resign_date_2!' ) t1) as sum_interest
FROM sc_mem_m_resign_requestment, sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_m_resign_share WHERE 1 = 1 and ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.resign_cause_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no = sc_mem_m_resign_share.resign_doc_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_resign_cause.dead_status = '1' ) --and ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_code = '01') --and ( sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_date between '!resign_date_1!' and '!resign_date_2!' ) /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_resign_requestment.resign_doc_no

r_ktm_req_resign_dead_net_loan_con_no.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_resign_loan.resign_doc_no, sc_mem_m_resign_loan.loan_contract_no, pka_com_function.fp_form(sc_mem_m_resign_loan.loan_contract_no ,'#-') as format_loan_contract_no , sc_mem_m_resign_loan.principal_balance, --88888888.88 as principal_balance, --888888.88 as interest, sc_mem_m_resign_loan.interest, to_tdate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'dd/mm/yyyy') as tdate_begining_of_contract, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card.backlist_count, sc_mem_m_resign_loan.interest_arrear FROM sc_mem_m_resign_loan, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card WHERE 1 = 1 and ( sc_mem_m_resign_loan.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( ( sc_mem_m_resign_loan.resign_doc_no = {0} ) )

r_ktm_req_resign_dead_nest_loan_coll.sql: select sc_mem_m_resign_loan.resign_doc_no, sc_mem_m_resign_loan.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description from sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_mem_m_resign_loan where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_mem_m_resign_loan.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_mem_m_resign_loan.resign_doc_no = {0}
